title: Crunchy Spicy Russian Chicken Kebabs
description: A spicy and crunchy post-workout Russian dish featuring shaoxing wine and shio-koji-cure, this recipe is FODMAP-friendly and perfect for dinner. It combines the flavors of Russia with the spices of Asia.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together shaoxing wine, shio-koji-cure, sriracha sauce, rice vinegar, olive oil, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Increase the oven temperature to broil and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the chicken is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the kebabs hot and enjoy.
